title: AT Field Destruction
wikitext:
[]: AT Field Destruction             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Sat Jul 29, 2006 11:55 pm Throughout the series, there are several times were AT Fields have been destroyed or nullified, Namely the battle between Unit-01 and Sachiel, and Third Impact. I think its obvious that ATF + AATF equals nothing, thus Instrumentality But how about the many other instances where ATFields cancel each other out? The best way to illustrate my theory is take the sine curve. the Sine curve is the ATF, so then what is the 'inverted ATF' and AATF? I think that the destruction of the ATF of angels was done by the sine curve being 180 degrees out of phase, calling for maximum destruction at the nodes (or was it anodes?) So in terms of the sine curve, the AATF would be the cosecant curve, the inverse of the sine curve (ATF). your thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sun Jul 30, 2006 1:20 am If then it seems the AT Field and Anti AT Field are like waves? Two waves that are coherent and in phase add up to get stronger, and anti-phase waves cancel out each other?

[]:             Quote Post by Dimmi » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:04 am I have another question about AT fields and rather than clogging up the forum with another thread I thought I'd stick it on the end of this one...hope that's okay! I may be wrong (I've only seen the series two or three times) but in the End of Evangelion, when Asuka and Kyoko were kicking JSSDF ass :P I noticed that instead of smashing some aircraft as she had before, she made a slashing gesture with her arm and the aircraft just exploded!! I'm not sure, but I don't think she actually touched them so...was she manipulating her AT field (somehow) to blow them up? has she always been able to do this? :)

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:57 am Normal AT-Fields open each other up, allowing two AT-Field-protected beings to inflict damage to each other. That's the whole reason the Evas are used to fight the Angels. An Anti-AT-Field completely nullifies an AT-Field, causing the body to be reduced to LCL, and the soul to be released. This is what happends during instrumentality, and it happened to the Katsuragi team during the Second Impact as well. Inverted AT-Fields were only mentioned with regards to Leliel, IIRC. Whereas normal AT-Fields keep things out , it would appear that inverted AT-Fields pull things in and keep them trapped inside. Hence how Leliel was able to pull Eva-01 into the Sea of Dirac and keep her there. It's something completely different from an Anti-AT-Field.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 30, 2006 9:27 am EVA-00 also does some wonky stuff with her ATF in #23 to "contain" Armisael. (Involving a "reversal" and stuff.) felineki wrote: An Anti-AT-Field completely nullifies an AT-Field, causing the body to be reduced to LCL, and the soul to be released. This is what happends during instrumentality , and it happened to the Katsuragi team during the Second Impact as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:59 pm Reichu wrote: The functionings of the AATF remain somewhat mysterious; for example, I have yet to hear an explanation for what the purpose of the harpies' AATF (as opposed to Lilith's) was.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 05, 2006 11:10 pm Rawinder wrote: To blow a hole into the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Aug 06, 2006 2:24 am Reichu wrote: Rawinder wrote: To blow a hole into the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Sun Aug 06, 2006 9:48 am Reichu wrote: That involves opening up your S2 and making a big kaboom. I'm not seeing how "Anti A.T. Field" and "Huge F*cking Explosion" have diddlysquit to do with one another.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Aug 06, 2006 11:56 am Err... As I recall, Fuyutsuki asked that, didn't he? Wasn't it like: "Anti-AT-Field ? " :S I'm a bit confused. Perhaps what Kozo called Anti-AT-Field is just an AT-Field with a different pattern or wavelength that blows away AT-Fields with a particular pattern...? :S ... ... Maybe there is an older thread that mentioned this. I recall talking about the mechanism of the AT-Field with OMF... If I put away my scientific point of view, then I would just simply call it the Song of Creation. The first part is Death - everybody splashes into LCL - and the second is Life or Birth (Rebirth? ) - the place is habitable again, and anybody can come back to life. EOE has such a beautiful music... aww...

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Aug 06, 2006 2:12 pm At this point, I'm viewing the relationship between AT fields and AAT fields as being akin to the relationship between matter and anti-matter. And just liek matter and anti-matter, AT fields are FAR more common and presumably easier to generate than AAT fields. And of course, the result of mixing the two is a big explosion, or possibly lots of very small, tang flavoured ones. Maybe there a connection here to the other particle physics references in the show. We at least know that Gainix had read up on particle physics.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Aug 06, 2006 3:25 pm I've also thought about the matter-anit-matter idea, but I dared not say a word, since the AT-Field is a lot different, and is not 3 dimensional as the matter/anti-matter (I've read a book where it was mentioned; it was like dust or something. I don't remember that part too well). Or at least I'm foolish enough to play with dimensions when souls and AT-Field comes to the topic. :S :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 10:15 am Reichu wrote: @Dimmi: Yep, and all Evas can do cool tricks like this. For something vaguely comparable, in #19 Yui gives Zeruel a huge thrashing just by "throwing" her ATF at him. http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-19/episode-19B-scene12A.html
